checklist.requirement: All seventh-wave runtime-autonomy child Beads are closed before closeout.

child_artifact_map.title: Expose deterministic effect-aware parallel tool batch evidence

checklist.requirement: Every seventh-wave child bead maps to pushed commits, source paths, tests or fixtures, evidence artifacts, validation commands, close reason, and claim-boundary text.
Effect-aware parallel tool batch evidence records deterministic barriers, fanout caps, and 64+ compatible-call coverage.
Remote validation proof reuse fails closed on dirty worktree, stale refs, missing RCH provenance, and toolchain or lockfile drift.
Doctor lane placement emits cgroup/NUMA-aware advisory lanes, temp roots, fanout budgets, caveats, and no-pinning boundaries.
Large-session replay acceleration covers sidecar selection, stale fallback, index reuse, and correctness evidence.
Provider/RPC/TUI fairness stress gate covers balanced load, slow stream, output flood, and frame-budget pressure fixtures.
Work-admission dry-run executor classifies would_execute, blocked, requires_operator, and never_execute actions without mutating source systems.
Extension hostcall QoS regression evidence proves non-flooding progress, S3-FIFO fairness counters, safe fallback status, and BRAVO rollback visibility.

evidence.boundary: Beads issue state, dependencies, and close reasons remain the work ledger.
Agent Mail coordinates ownership but does not replace Beads, git, source inspection, or validation evidence; degraded Mail falls back to Beads soft locks.
The seventh-wave closeout gate summarizes existing evidence and does not mutate runtime sources or operator state.
Heavy Cargo validation evidence must prove RCH execution.
Staged UBS remains mandatory before the closeout commit.
Beads ledger reconciliation remains mandatory before closeout.
Seventh-wave runtime-autonomy closeout evidence is advisory and does not authorize release, benchmark, capacity, performance, or strict drop-in claims.
The gate must not mutate Agent Mail storage, RCH worker state, installed extensions, user config, runtime throttles, git refs, or temp artifacts.
The seventh-wave gate may reference prior-wave authority boundaries but must not rewrite sixth-wave contracts or evidence.
The closeout gate summarizes child evidence and does not replace source tests, contracts, Beads, pushed commits, RCH, UBS, or CI.

checklist.requirement: Closeout source boundaries preserve Beads, Agent Mail, RCH, UBS, ledger, prior-wave, child-artifact, no-delete, and release-claim authorities.
All prerequisite child commits are pushed to origin/main and legacy origin/master before final closeout generation.
Required closeout quality gates passed for script generation, JSON contracts, UBS, and Beads ledger.

claim_boundaries.allowed_claim: advisory seventh-wave runtime autonomy closeout evidence only

known_limitations: Seventh-wave runtime-autonomy closeout evidence is advisory operator evidence only.
RCH, Agent Mail, Beads, Doctor, runpack, claim-readiness proofs, and child tests remain their own sources of truth.
This closeout does not authorize release, benchmark, capacity, performance, or strict drop-in claims.
This gate references prior-wave boundaries but does not rewrite sixth-wave contracts or evidence.
